name: spotify-top-tracks-filtered
description: Fetch top tracks filtered by genre — returns only tracks whose Spotify artist genre tags match the given keywords. Handles all pagination and artist lookups server-side. Use for playlist tasks like 'my top Texas/Americana/Country/Folk tracks' or 'filter my top songs by genre'. Returns track URIs ready to pass directly to the upsert playlist tool.

input.description: genres is a comma-separated list of genre keywords to match (case-insensitive substring match against Spotify genre tags). time_range and pages are optional.

time_range.description: short_term (4 weeks), medium_term (6 months), long_term (all time, default)

pages.description: Number of pages to fetch, 1-4 (default: 4 = up to 200 tracks)

output.description: Returns {tracks: [{uri, name, artists, genres}], total_fetched, total_matched, genres_used}. Pass tracks[*].uri directly to spotify-upsert-playlist.
